nodes.label: Iterative refinement from delegation to collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: At first I will delegate the task to the AI and then as I make the search or the request more granular and streamline it to produce the output I need, it becomes more conversation and less instructional

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: If an email involves a conversation that should be more personable I tend to create it myself. I also avoid using AI to create or research anything that involves our security set up
